questions.question: A distributed system consists of multiple machines with physical clocks that drift at different rates. Describe a method to synchronize these physical clocks in a distributed system. (5 marks)
A distributed system uses NTP to synchronize its physical clocks. What is the primary advantage of using NTP over other clock synchronization protocols? (5 marks)

A distributed system's physical clocks are synchronized using an atomic clock, which has a constant frequency. What would happen to the system if the atomic clock suddenly lost synchronization with the other clocks? (5 marks)
